description:
Offered: spring and summer
This course is a continuation of General Chemistry I. Topics include chemical, acid/base, and solubility equilibria and chemical kinetics.
Prerequisite(s): A grade of at least 1.7 in CHEM 1300 (2.0 for Biology and Chemistry majors) and successful completion of MATH 0500 [Algebraic Prep.]
Note: Chemistry majors must earn a grade of 2.0 or higher in this course in order to remain in this major.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): SMT, PL, SI
prerequisites: A grade of at least 1.7 in CHEM 1300 (2.0 for Biology and Chemistry majors) and successful completion of MATH 0500 [Algebraic Prep.]
